question_text:
1188. Design Bounded Blocking Queue

Implement a thread-safe bounded blocking queue that has the following methods:

  • BoundedBlockingQueue(int capacity) The constructor initializes the queue with a maximum capacity.
  • void enqueue(int element) Adds an element to the front of the queue. If the queue is full, the calling thread is blocked until the queue is no longer full.
  • int dequeue() Returns the element at the rear of the queue and removes it. If the queue is empty, the calling thread is blocked until the queue is no longer empty.
  • int size() Returns the number of elements currently in the queue.

Your implementation will be tested with multiple threads for concurrent access on the queue. Each thread will either be a producer thread that only makes calls to the enqueue method or a consumer thread that only makes calls to the dequeue method.

 

Example 1:

Input:
1
1
["BoundedBlockingQueue","enqueue","dequeue","dequeue","enqueue","enqueue","enqueue","size","dequeue","size"]
[[2],[1],[],[],[0],[2],[3],[],[],[]]

Output:
[1,0,2,2]

Explanation:
Number of producer threads = 1
Number of consumer threads = 1
BoundedBlockingQueue capacity = 2.
producer thread calls enqueue(1).
consumer thread calls dequeue() and returns 1.
consumer thread calls dequeue(), queue is empty, blocked.
producer thread calls enqueue(0).
consumer thread unblocked, returns 0.
producer thread calls enqueue(2).
producer thread calls enqueue(3), queue is full, blocked.
consumer thread calls size(), returns 2.
consumer thread calls dequeue() and returns 2.
producer thread unblocked.
consumer thread calls size(), returns 2.

 

Constraints:

  • 1 <= capacity <= 104
  • 0 <= element <= 105
  • 1 <= Number of producer threads <= 15
  • 1 <= Number of consumer threads <= 15
  • 1 <= Number of enqueue calls <= 105
  • 1 <= Number of dequeue calls <= 105
explanation: Use a deque/list with a semaphore or conditional variable to block producers when queue is full and consumers when empty. In Python use threading.Semaphore or queue.Queue.
